data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for materials used tracking, specifically mentioning receipt photo uploads. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this feature, indicating a clear gap in coverage. The linked use case mentions materials tracking but does not provide concrete evidence of the functionality being validated, leading to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of materials used tracking with receipt photo upload being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for materials tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the materials used tracking and receipt photo upload functionality.
